name: FavoritesCommands
summary: Tapir Add-On 'Favorites Commands' command group — 4 JSON-RPC commands.

methods.name: GetFavoritesByType
methods.summary: Returns a list of the names of all favorites with the given element type

methods.name: GetFavoritePreviewImage
methods.signature: GetFavoritePreviewImage(favorite: string, imageType?: string, format?: string, width?: integer, height?: integer): object
methods.summary: Returns the preview image of the given favorite.

params.name: imageType
params.doc: The type of the preview image. Default is 3D.

params.name: format
params.doc: The image format. Default is png.

params.name: width
params.doc: The width of the preview image in pixels. Default is 128.

params.name: height
params.doc: The height of the preview image in pixels. Default is 128.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: previewImage.

methods.name: ApplyFavoritesToElementDefaults
methods.summary: Apply the given favorites to element defaults.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: executionResults.

methods.name: CreateFavoritesFromElements
methods.summary: Create favorites from the given elements.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: executionResults.
